## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard new employee Katia Pembayun and guide her through Day 1 processes at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Katia to set up essential tools (1Password, Slack, Notion, Zoom, Linear, Fathom) and complete Day 1 onboarding tasks](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [GrowthX offers unlimited PTO (20-30 days/year recommended) with a simple calendar-based process](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [4-hour overlap with PST required; no strict working hours, but daily Gitbot updates expected](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - Team email (<team@grotexlabs.com>) used for logging into most company tools

## Topics

### Tool Setup and Access

  - [Essential tools: 1Password, Slack, Notion, Zoom, Linear, Fathom](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)
  - [BITTools Slack channel for tech support (Alice or Yusuf can assist)](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - Team email (<team@grotexlabs.com>) setup guided; used for most tool logins
  - [Linear project management tool with specific onboarding project for Katia](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=898.0)

### Company Policies and Practices

  - [Unlimited PTO: 20-30 days/year recommended, calendar-based process](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [$10K referral bonus for engineering roles, $5K for non-engineering (after 6 months)](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [4-hour overlap with PST required, but flexible working hours](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Daily Gitbot updates in BEPD Slack channel for transparency](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [Bi-weekly all-hands meetings; new employees introduce themselves](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Notion-based company-wide onboarding guide](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)

  - [Onboarding buddy to be assigned by manager (REN)](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
  - [Bootcamps led by CEO (Marcel) and sales lead (Kyle)](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=882.0)
  - [Fill out bio in team directory](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)

  - [Katia inquired about healthcare enrollment process](https://fathom.video/share/W1UZSn-xjzCeHRty4xfax_YfjsGhYTJQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1165.0)
